requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — NISIT, ICCC, PNG Power, and Project Procurement Context
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——NISIT、ICCC、PNG Power及项目采购背景
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——NISIT、ICCC、PNG Power及項目採購背景

summary.en: For Papua New Guinea solar PV inverter projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the practical international safety baseline for power converters used in photovoltaic power systems. NISIT is the national standards body, ICCC has consumer and electricity regulatory functions, and PNG Power Ltd or the project owner may require third-party safety evidence for equipment acceptance, grid connection, or procurement. Project-financed systems, mining and LNG sites, and off-grid or microgrid installations commonly require internationally recognisable type-test certificates from accredited laboratories because local public product-specific PV inverter certification procedures are limited.
summary.zh: 对于巴布亚新几内亚太阳能光伏逆变器项目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏电力系统用功率变换器的实际国际安全基准。NISIT为国家标准机构，ICCC承担消费者和电力监管职能，PNG Power Ltd或项目业主可能为设备接收、并网或采购要求第三方安全证据。项目融资系统、矿业和LNG站点以及离网或微电网装置通常要求来自认可实验室、可被国际识别的型式试验证书，因为当地公开的产品特定光伏逆变器认证程序有限。
summary.zht: 對於巴布亞紐幾內亞太陽能光伏逆變器項目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏電力系統用功率轉換器的實際國際安全基準。NISIT為國家標準機構，ICCC承擔消費者和電力監管職能，PNG Power Ltd或項目業主可能為設備接收、併網或採購要求第三方安全證據。項目融資系統、礦業和LNG站點以及離網或微電網裝置通常要求來自認可實驗室、可被國際識別的型式試驗證書，因為當地公開的產品特定光伏逆變器認證程序有限。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
NISIT standards adoption and conformity context
ICCC consumer and electricity regulatory oversight
PNG Power Ltd or project-owner equipment acceptance requirements

summary.en: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021 and voluntary CQC or CGC certification supported by CNAS-accredited laboratory testing. This documentation may be useful as a China baseline, but it is not automatically accepted in Papua New Guinea as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence. Where project specifications call for IEC, AS/NZS-influenced, donor, or owner standards, China domestic GB/T evidence must be supplemented with the requested IEC safety reports.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021以及由CNAS认可实验室测试支持的自愿性CQC或CGC认证。该文件可作为中国基线参考，但不会在巴布亚新几内亚自动被接受为等同于IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。若项目规格要求IEC、受AS/NZS影响的标准、出资方标准或业主标准，中国国内GB/T证据须补充所要求的IEC安全报告。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021以及由CNAS認可實驗室測試支持的自願性CQC或CGC認證。該文件可作為中國基線參考，但不會在巴布亞紐幾內亞自動被接受為等同於IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。若項目規格要求IEC、受AS/NZS影響的標準、出資方標準或業主標準，中國國內GB/T證據須補充所要求的IEC安全報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC/CGC voluntary PV inverter certification based on China domestic standards and CNAS-accredited testing

gap.en: Gap: China domestic GB/T safety evidence does not remove the need for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence where Papua New Guinea project owners, PNG Power, donors, EPCs, or NISIT-referenced specifications require IEC documentation. Exporters should provide type-test certificates covering the exact inverter model or family, identify the laboratory accreditation basis, and confirm any environmental derating for high humidity, coastal corrosion, elevated ambient temperature, and remote-site maintenance constraints.
gap.zh: 差距：在巴布亚新几内亚项目业主、PNG Power、出资方、EPC或NISIT引用规格要求IEC文件时，中国国内GB/T安全证据不能免除IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据要求。出口商应提供覆盖具体逆变器型号或系列的型式试验证书，说明实验室认可依据，并确认高湿、沿海腐蚀、较高环境温度及偏远站点维护限制下的任何环境降额要求。
gap.zht: 差距：在巴布亞紐幾內亞項目業主、PNG Power、出資方、EPC或NISIT引用規格要求IEC文件時，中國國內GB/T安全證據不能免除IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據要求。出口商應提供覆蓋具體逆變器型號或系列的型式試驗證書，說明實驗室認可依據，並確認高濕、沿海腐蝕、較高環境溫度及偏遠站點維護限制下的任何環境降額要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in procurement, donor, EPC, PNG Power, or owner specifications for grid-tied, mining, LNG, off-grid, and microgrid PV projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme dependent under China domestic PV inverter practice; not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-only GB/T 37408 or voluntary CQC/CGC safety package should not be treated as a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence in Papua New Guinea projects. Prepare model-specific IEC 62109 certificates and confirm project-specific environmental, grid-connection, and owner acceptance requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅基于中国GB/T 37408或自愿性CQC/CGC的安全文件包视为巴布亚新几内亚项目IEC 62109-1/-2证据的替代。请准备针对具体型号的IEC 62109证书，并在发货前确认项目特定环境、并网和业主接收要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅基於中國GB/T 37408或自願性CQC/CGC的安全文件包視為巴布亞紐幾內亞項目IEC 62109-1/-2證據的替代。請準備針對具體型號的IEC 62109證書，並在發貨前確認項目特定環境、併網和業主接收要求。
